# fal-realtime

> Curated from the fal.ai community team.

## What it does

Real-time and streaming AI image generation via fal.ai. Suited for moodboard exploration, draft variations, and rapid creative iteration.

## Source

- Category: `image-generation`

## How to use

This catalogue entry advertises the skill in Frontend Design so the agent
discovers it during planning. To run the full upstream workflow with
its original assets, scripts, and references, install the upstream
bundle into your active agent's skills directory:

```bash
# Inspect the upstream README for exact paths
```

Then ask the agent to invoke this skill by name (`fal-realtime`) or with
one of the trigger phrases listed in this skill's frontmatter.
